name: Void Hues
descriptionTemplate: Grant a chosen Awakener [Arg1] Aliemus, and shuffle 1 {Insight} into the Draw Pile. If Pickman is in the team, he gains 1 stack of {Creativity}.
lore:
The rotting phantasm gives birth to a distorted neon on the retina—
thus the concept of "color" transcends the virtual world, leaving only the delirious hues flowing on the corpse of reality.
